columns.name: PARTINR
columns.description: Unique identifier for a stock item or part number

columns.name: KORRTEKST
columns.description: Description or text related to the status or condition of the parti

columns.name: DYRKINGS_SYSTEM
columns.description: The system or method used for cultivation or management of the parti

columns.name: REG_DATO
columns.description: Date when the parti was registered or last updated

columns.name: SIST_ENDR_DATO
columns.description: Date of the last modification to the parti record

columns.name: REG_BRUKER
columns.description: Username or identifier of the user who registered the parti

columns.name: SIST_ENDR_BRUKER
columns.description: Username or identifier of the user who last modified the parti record
